data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft's website infrastructure is built on a microservices architecture, facilitating agility and scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Utilizes a CDN for global content distribution to ensure fast load times and reduce latency.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Leverages serverless functions to optimize resource usage and reduce operational overhead.

data.title: Cloud-Based Hosting
data.description: Hosted on Azure's cloud infrastructure, providing scalability and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Azure App Service, Virtual Machines, Global Regions

data.title: Database Architecture
data.description: Incorporates both relational and non-relational databases to handle complex queries and large data volumes.
